purpose: Candidate external test-set programs for the fallback-dependent program families in chapter 4 follow-up experiments.

selection_scope.reason: The included families are the ones that currently rely most on fallback or still exhibit incomplete semantic grounding.

expected_task_traits: feedback or congestion signal after disturbance
operator action grounding is often required

candidates.why_candidate: Classic telemetry-style program with per-hop metadata export; close to Link Monitor but not identical.
candidates.suggested_use: Primary external test program for telemetry fallback generalization.
expected_evaluation_focus: Can the fallback model recognize telemetry semantics?
Can it produce observation requirements without hand-written templates?

candidates.program_path_hint: repository root; INT collector + sender/receiver utilities
candidates.why_candidate: Stronger telemetry/INT style program that should test whether fallback knowledge transfers beyond the local Link Monitor implementation.
candidates.suggested_use: Secondary telemetry external test program with richer observation semantics.
matching_signals: monitoring result extraction via packet payload
expected_evaluation_focus: Generalization from simple probe monitoring to richer INT-like observation

candidates.why_candidate: Low-friction ECMP/load-distribution program to test whether the fallback model learned multi-flow dispersion patterns instead of memorizing a single CALB implementation.
candidates.suggested_use: Baseline external test program for load-distribution family.
expected_evaluation_focus: Can the fallback model preserve multi-flow semantics without congestion-feedback complexity?

candidates.program_path_hint: repository root; dynamic load-balancing research prototype
candidates.why_candidate: Closer to congestion-aware load balancing than the tutorial ECMP example; more suitable for testing feedback-oriented fallback knowledge.
candidates.suggested_use: Advanced external test program once the simpler tutorial load-balancer path is stable.
expected_evaluation_focus: Can the fallback model express congestion-triggered reroute or path-switch behavior?

candidates.program_path_hint: heavy-hitter related project listing; exact subproject to be confirmed
candidates.why_candidate: Closest publicly referenced family to Heavy Hitter Detector in terms of state accumulation and threshold-driven discrimination.
candidates.suggested_use: Preferred external threshold/state-accumulation test program if repository structure is confirmed.
expected_evaluation_focus: Can the fallback model recover threshold-crossing scenario structure on an unseen implementation?

candidates.why_candidate: Broader stateful detection family rather than pure heavy-hitter thresholding; usable only if a cleaner heavy-hitter candidate is unavailable.
candidates.suggested_use: Fallback backup candidate for threshold/state-accumulation family.
expected_evaluation_focus: Whether the fallback model transfers generic state-accumulation structure beyond heavy-hitter naming
